Thodari Adadaa Ithuyenna Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Haricharan & Vandana Srinivasan

aasa
alapaayudhu paayudhu
aala
poli podudhu podudhu
yaeno
oru maadhiri aagudhadi

dhegam
kuda saayudhu saayudhu
paarva pada
kaayudhu kaayudhu
thaanaa
uyir theeyila vegudhadi

Oosi mazha
thoorudhu thoorudhu
oorey niram
maarudhu maarudhu
yedho pudhu vaasana
pookkudhadi.

vaartha edhum
pesida thonala
vaarraen un pinnaala.
veru oru vaarthaya
thaedida aagaadhu
ini ennaala.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the lead actors in the movie Thodari?

The lead roles are played by Dhanush and Keerthy Suresh.

What is the theme of the song Adadaa Ithuyenna?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and introspection.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music was composed by D Imman.

When was the movie Thodari released?

The movie was released in the year 2016.

What genre does the song belong to?

The song is a melodious duet with romantic undertones.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song "Adadaa Ithuyenna" from the 2016 movie "Thodari," starring Dhanush and Keerthy Suresh, is a melodious duet that captures the essence of love and introspection. Sung by Haricharan and Vandhana Srinivasan, the song's lyrics delve into the emotions of longing and connection. Composed by D Imman, it features a soothing tune that resonates with listeners. The song's placement in the movie enhances its emotional depth, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Adadaa Ithuyenna is a captivating melody from the movie Thodari, featuring the soulful voices of Haricharan and Vandhana Srinivasan. Composed by D Imman, this song beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and longing. Its heartfelt lyrics and melodious tune make it a timeless favorite among Tamil music enthusiasts.
stanzaMeanings: This stanza contains the song title and singer information, no translation needed.
Oh dear, what is this feeling? I don't understand it at all.
Oh dear, what happened to me? I can't figure it out.
Was I lying as a shadow? Did I rise as myself? Did I come alive to see and touch you?
Oh dear, what is this feeling? I don't understand it at all.
Desires are overflowing, the heart is racing, something feels different.
Even the body is weakening, the gaze is burning, the soul feels like it's on fire.
Desire is like a play. Don't watch it.
Hot news is being discussed, but you don't nod your head.
Don't show the way by holding green grass in your hand.
Oh dear, what is this feeling? I don't understand it at all.
The drizzle is falling, the town is changing colors, a new fragrance is blooming.
Love is taking over, a different pleasure is spreading, it's intensifying.
I don't feel like saying any words, I follow you. I can't search for another word anymore.
My entire life has been lost in a single glance.
Oh dear, what is this feeling? I don't understand it at all.
Was I lying as a shadow? Did I rise as myself? Did I come alive to see and touch you?
Oh dear, what is this feeling? I don't understand it at all.
This stanza is empty, no translation needed.
